# Cyberlounge Portfolio

> Personal portfolio + lead-gen site (cyberlounge.net) for Nicholas Perry's software & cloud consulting, built on Next.js 15 App Router.

## Project Overview

**Tech Stack:** Next.js 15.1.7, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 3, Framer Motion 12
**Status:** Active (deployed to Vercel)
**Purpose:** Showcase projects, communicate capabilities, route prospects to a Cal.com booking flow

## Core Documentation

- `README.md` — Setup and getting started
- `CODE_MAP.md` — Feature-to-file map
- `docs/ai/memory.md` — Project history and current state
- `docs/ai/roadmap.md` — Forward-looking priorities
- `docs/ai/tasks.md` — Active work + tech-debt list
- `docs/ai/decisions.md` — Architecture decisions (ADRs)
- `docs/ai/architecture.md` — System design + design tokens
- `ENTRY_POINTS.md` — Where execution starts
- `DATA_FLOW.md` — System-level data movement
- `FEATURE_BOUNDARIES.md` — Component responsibilities
- `IMPORT_GRAPH_SUMMARY.md` — Coupling overview

## Key Files by Area

### Site shell
- `src/app/layout.tsx` — Root layout, fonts (Geist, Geist Mono, Fraunces), metadata, Navbar/Footer mount
- `src/components/Navbar.tsx` — Top nav with active-state underline + mobile menu
- `src/components/Footer.tsx` — Footer (quick links + socials)
- `src/app/globals.css` — Design tokens + utility classes (`.eyebrow`, `.divider`, `.link-accent`)
- `tailwind.config.ts` — Tailwind theme mapping CSS variables to color/font tokens

### Pages (all static)
- `src/app/page.tsx` — Home (hero + capabilities + featured projects)
- `src/app/about/page.tsx` — Bio, expertise, timeline, principles
- `src/app/projects/page.tsx` — Three project entries (Rooted Legacy, Reality Saving, The Motions)
- `src/app/contact/page.tsx` — Services + Cal.com booking + social channels

### Shared
- `src/components/MotionWrapper.tsx` — Client-boundary `MotionDiv` re-export

## Common Tasks

**To run locally:** `npm install && npm run dev` → http://localhost:3000
**To build:** `npm run build && npm start`
**To lint:** `npm run lint`
**To change the design system:** edit both `src/app/globals.css` (CSS vars) and `tailwind.config.ts` (theme tokens) — they must stay in sync.
**To add a project:** append to the `projects` array in `src/app/projects/page.tsx` and the `featuredProjects` array in `src/app/page.tsx`; drop the image at `public/projects/<slug>.jpg`.

## Environment Variables

- None currently consumed by the codebase.
